name: Chocolate Chip Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease the bottom only of an 8 x 8 x 2-inch square baking dish.
2. Mix together brown sugar, margarine, egg, and vanilla in a bowl until well combined.
3. Stir in flour, oats, baking powder, and salt until evenly incorporated.
4. Spread the mixture evenly into the prepared baking dish.
5. Sprinkle chocolate chips and chopped nuts over the top of the dough.
6. Microwave uncovered on high for 4 minutes.
7. Turn the baking dish one-quarter turn.
8. Continue microwaving until no longer doughy, about 2 to 3 more minutes.
9. Allow the squares to cool completely.
10. Cut into about 2-inch squares.
11. Makes 16 cookies.
